name: Rouge Tank
short_description: An exciting experience that will quench your thirst for solid gameplay, four games in one!
detailed_description:
Custom c++ engine Made by hand using the SFML API
Rouge Tank is both a 2D bullet hell fending off strange monsters, and a Puzzle Game inspired from the Atari classic Adventure. From different game modes to different unlockable skills, steam achievements, and solid gameplay, Rouge Tank provides a simple, captivating experience for all gamers. 

Now including four whole games !!

RoboTower !
An EndlessRunner !

and... a Nameless dungeon crawler all made an Java Processing, launched with the engine from Rouge Tank !!

Maciaz joined as an artist for both Rouge Tank, and the new dungeon crawler!
